title: helonias viridis
intro: Helonias viridis, also known as green dragon, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Helonias viridis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
